mapper.select: select e.evalId, e.evalStatus, e.weightedScore, emp.emp_id as targetEmpId, emp.emp_name as targetEmpName, emp.emp_no as targetEmpNo, dept.dept_name as targetDeptName, pos.pos_name as targetPosName from employee emp join department dept on emp.dept_id = dept.dept_id join emp_position pos on emp.pos_id = pos.pos_id left join ( select eval_id as evalId, target_emp_id, weighted_score as weightedScore, eval_status as evalStatus from performance_evaluation where period_id = #{periodId} and evaluator_id = #{evaluatorId} and eval_type = 'LEADER' ) e on e.target_emp_id = emp.emp_id where emp.dept_id in ( select dept_id from department where emp_id = #{evaluatorId} ) and emp.emp_id != #{evaluatorId} and emp.emp_status = '재직' order by pos.pos_order, emp.emp_no

select pe.eval_id as evalId, pe.period_id as periodId, pe.target_emp_id as targetEmpId, pe.evaluator_id as evaluatorId, pe.eval_type as evalType, pe.score_performance as scorePerformance, pe.score_expertise as scoreExpertise, pe.score_teamwork as scoreTeamwork, pe.score_attitude as scoreAttitude, pe.score_growth as scoreGrowth, pe.weighted_score as weightedScore, pe.strength_comment as strengthComment, pe.improvement_comment as improvementComment, pe.eval_status as evalStatus, TO_CHAR(pe.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, TO_CHAR(pe.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as updatedAt, p.title as periodTitle, p.eval_year as periodYear, p.eval_term as periodTerm, emp.emp_name as targetEmpName, emp.emp_no as targetEmpNo, dept.dept_name as targetDeptName, pos.pos_name as targetPosName, evaluator.emp_name as evaluatorName, evPos.pos_name as evaluatorPosName from performance_evaluation pe join evaluation_period p on pe.period_id = p.period_id join employee emp on pe.target_emp_id = emp.emp_id join department dept on emp.dept_id = dept.dept_id join emp_position pos on emp.pos_id = pos.pos_id join employee evaluator on pe.evaluator_id = evaluator.emp_id join emp_position evPos on evaluator.pos_id = evPos.pos_id where pe.eval_id = #{evalId}

select eval_id as evalId, period_id as periodId, target_emp_id as targetEmpId, evaluator_id as evaluatorId, eval_type as evalType, score_performance as scorePerformance, score_expertise as scoreExpertise, score_teamwork as scoreTeamwork, score_attitude as scoreAttitude, score_growth as scoreGrowth, weighted_score as weightedScore, strength_comment as strengthComment, improvement_comment as improvementComment, eval_status as evalStatus, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, TO_CHAR(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as updatedAt from performance_evaluation where period_id = #{periodId} and target_emp_id = #{targetEmpId} and evaluator_id = #{evaluatorId} and eval_type = #{evalType}

select pe.eval_id as evalId, pe.period_id as periodId, pe.target_emp_id as targetEmpId, pe.evaluator_id as evaluatorId, pe.eval_type as evalType, pe.score_performance as scorePerformance, pe.score_expertise as scoreExpertise, pe.score_teamwork as scoreTeamwork, pe.score_attitude as scoreAttitude, pe.score_growth as scoreGrowth, pe.weighted_score as weightedScore, pe.strength_comment as strengthComment, pe.improvement_comment as improvementComment, pe.eval_status as evalStatus, TO_CHAR(pe.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, TO_CHAR(pe.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as updatedAt, p.title as periodTitle, p.eval_year as periodYear, p.eval_term as periodTerm, evaluator.emp_name as evaluatorName from performance_evaluation pe join evaluation_period p on pe.period_id = p.period_id join employee evaluator on pe.evaluator_id = evaluator.emp_id where pe.target_emp_id = #{targetEmpId} and pe.eval_status = 'SUBMITTED' and p.period_status in ('CLOSED', 'REPORTED') order by p.eval_year desc, case p.eval_term when 'ANNUAL' then 3 when 'H2' then 2 when 'H1' then 1 end desc

select pe.eval_id as evalId, pe.period_id as periodId, pe.target_emp_id as targetEmpId, pe.evaluator_id as evaluatorId, pe.eval_type as evalType, pe.score_performance as scorePerformance, pe.score_expertise as scoreExpertise, pe.score_teamwork as scoreTeamwork, pe.score_attitude as scoreAttitude, pe.score_growth as scoreGrowth, pe.weighted_score as weightedScore, pe.eval_status as evalStatus, TO_CHAR(pe.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, TO_CHAR(pe.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as updatedAt, emp.emp_name as targetEmpName, emp.emp_no as targetEmpNo, dept.dept_name as targetDeptName, pos.pos_name as targetPosName, evaluator.emp_name as evaluatorName from performance_evaluation pe join employee emp on pe.target_emp_id = emp.emp_id join department dept on emp.dept_id = dept.dept_id join emp_position pos on emp.pos_id = pos.pos_id join employee evaluator on pe.evaluator_id = evaluator.emp_id where pe.period_id = #{periodId} order by pos.pos_order, emp.emp_no
select count(*) from performance_evaluation where period_id = #{periodId} and evaluator_id = #{evaluatorId} and eval_status = 'SUBMITTED'
mapper.insert: insert into performance_evaluation ( period_id, target_emp_id, evaluator_id, eval_type, score_performance, score_expertise, score_teamwork, score_attitude, score_growth, weighted_score, strength_comment, improvement_comment, eval_status ) values ( #{periodId}, #{targetEmpId}, #{evaluatorId}, #{evalType}, #{scorePerformance}, #{scoreExpertise}, #{scoreTeamwork}, #{scoreAttitude}, #{scoreGrowth}, #{weightedScore}, #{strengthComment}, #{improvementComment}, #{evalStatus} )
mapper.update: update performance_evaluation set score_performance = #{scorePerformance}, score_expertise = #{scoreExpertise}, score_teamwork = #{scoreTeamwork}, score_attitude = #{scoreAttitude}, score_growth = #{scoreGrowth}, weighted_score = #{weightedScore}, strength_comment = #{strengthComment}, improvement_comment = #{improvementComment}, eval_status = #{evalStatus} where eval_id = #{evalId}
